name: Multi- Grain Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine boiling water with cracked wheat, 7-grain mixture, molasses, and oil. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
2. Add the yeast, sugar, whole wheat flour, rye flour, wheat germ, bran, nonfat dry milk powder, sunflower seeds, salt, and egg in the order listed to the mixing bowl of a bread machine.
3. Pour in the cooled grain mixture.
4. Select the white bread setting and press "Start".
5. For a milder taste, substitute honey for molasses.
6. After the first kneading cycle, remove the dough from the bread machine.
7. Divide the dough into two equal portions and place them in small loaf pans.
8. Cover the pans with plastic wrap or a lid.
9. Allow the dough to rise until it has doubled in size, about 45 minutes to 1 hour.
10. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
11. Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
